name: io.github.codespar/mcp-bradesco
description: MCP server for Bradesco — Brazil's 2nd largest private bank. Pix, Cobrança (boleto), Arrecadação, and Extrato via Bradesco's Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: BRADESCO_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Bradesco OAuth client_id issued via the Developer Portal after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: BRADESCO_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2.

environmentVariables.name: BRADESCO_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
